project_description: TARC PROJECTS LIMITED, a wholly owned subsidiary of TARC Limited, is in process of developing group housing project by the name “TARC Kailasa” (“Project”) comprising 417 Residential Units, 175 EWS Units and 175 CSP Units along with amenities, facilities, services etc. and such other developments as may be permitted. The Project is on a contiguous land parcel being Plot No. 67, situated at Najafgarh Road, Kirti Nagar, New Delhi, West Delhi, Delhi - 110015. The said Project is being developed in single phase.

professional_information.name: GIAN P MATHUR & ASSOCIATES PRIVATE LIMITED
